---
title: "Power Systems Decarbonization"
description: "Exploring the pathways, technology, market, impacts, and implications of clean power transition"
#author: "DEEP Lab"
#date: "2024-07-01"
#categories: [news, job]
image: "featured.jpeg"
#css: /custom.css
listing: 
- id: featured-publications
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description, date]
  grid-item-align: left
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 200px
  max-items: 4
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents: 
    - ../../publications.yml
  include: 
    categories: "power-system"


- id: featured-resources
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description, date]
  grid-item-align: left
  grid-columns: 2
  max-items: 2
  image-height: 200px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents: 
    - ../../resources.yml
  include: 
    categories: "power-system"


- id: featured-events
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description, date]
  grid-item-align: left
  grid-columns: 2
  max-items: 2
  image-height: 200px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents: 
    - ../../events/2024-07-19-workshop-on-open-modeling-carbon-neutrality-of-the-power-sector/index.qmd  
    - ../../events/2025-09-23-nyc-climate-week-nuclear-energy-panel/index.qmd
    - ../../events.yml
  include: 
    categories: "power-system"

- id: featured-projects
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description, date]
  grid-item-align: left
  grid-columns: 2
  max-items: 4
  image-height: 200px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:  
    - ../../projects.yml
  include: 
    categories: "power-system"
---

![Pakini Nui Wind Farm in Hawaii, Photo by Gang He](featured.jpeg)


## Overview

"Electrifying energy and decarbonizing electricity" is at the heart of the global energy transition. This research theme focuses on transforming the energy landscape by increasing electrification in various sectors, such as transportation, buildings, and industry, while simultaneously decarbonizing the electricity supply. The goal is to explore the pathways to net-zero-emissions power systems and their environmental, climate, human health, and socio-economic implications.


## Featured publications

:::{#featured-publications}
:::

<p align="right">[More Publications »](/more-publications.qmd#category=power-system)</p>

## Featured resources

:::{#featured-resources}
:::

<p align="right">[More Resources »](/resources.qmd)</p>

## Featured events

:::{#featured-events}
:::

<p align="right">[More Events »](/more-events.qmd#category=power-system)</p>

## Featured projects

:::{#featured-projects}
:::

<p align="right">[More Projects »](/projects.qmd)</p>

<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
